description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php Docker image globally and a global before_script that runs `apt-get -qq update`, `apt-get -y -qq install git unzip`, `curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/composer https://getcomposer.org/composer.phar`, `chmod +x /usr/local/bin/composer`, and `composer install --prefer-dist -n -q`. Add a test stage with a phpcs job that allows failure, runs `curl -OL https://squizlabs.github.io/PHP_CodeSniffer/phpcs.phar` then `php phpcs.phar --standard=psr2 src/`. Add a test stage with a test job that runs `./vendor/bin/phpunit`, and a test:5 job that uses the php:5 image and runs `./vendor/bin/phpunit`. Add a deploy stage with an insight job that uses the tutum/curl image, runs only on the master branch, overrides before_script with a no‑op `echo`, and executes `curl -X POST -H "Accept: application/vnd.com.sensiolabs.insight+xml" "https://$INSIGHT_USER:$INSIGHT_TOKEN@insight.sensiolabs.com/api/projects/$INSIGHT_PROJECT/analyses"`. Add a deploy stage with a packagist job that also uses tutum/curl, runs only on tags, overrides before_script with `echo`, and executes `curl -XPOST -H'content-type:application/json' "https://packagist.org/api/update-package?username=b17&apiToken=$PACKAGIST_API_TOKEN" -d'{"repository":{"url":"https://gitlab.com/vnphp/fragment-bundle"}}'`.
